name: code-distilling
description: Port high-quality implementations from reference open-source repos into your project with discipline: analysis, spec, plan, implementation, and verification against the reference.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined porting of features from reference open-source repos into your project.
interface.longDescription: Use Code Distilling to analyze a reference repo, write a distillation spec (per-chunk mode copy / port / learn-then-rewrite, a keep-verbatim list, and a seam mapping to your deps), turn it into a bite-sized implementation plan, execute the port task by task with two-stage review, and verify the result against the reference with a gap report.
defaultPrompt: I want to port a feature from /path/to/reference-repo into my project.
Help me distill the OAuth implementation from this reference.
